nodes.excerpt: TLDR : Anaconda is good, but Docker offers many more benefits. You can configure Docker to allow live development within a container. This…
nodes.description: Doesn't work on my computer" is extremely common. Avoid it by using Docker.

nodes.title: Starting with Package Managers
nodes.excerpt: TLDR : Most Data Scientists need Anaconda, rather than Mini-Anaconda, as it comes with all the important packages we would want. Anaconda is…
nodes.description: The importance of an easy to use package manager is often over looked. Being able to manage and create virtual environments is a key skill for Data Scientists.
